commands.label: Node 자동 테스트
commands.stdout:
> relay10@0.1.1 test
> node --test test/*.test.mjs

✔ parseModelCatalog normalizes Codex JSON and sorts by priority (1.17625ms)
✔ buildCatalog maps visible models to frontier, balanced, and economy (0.329958ms)
✔ explicit role overrides win and validate supported effort (0.237333ms)
✔ discoverCatalog injects execution and passes the configured invocation (0.13425ms)
✔ strict parser keeps boolean flags separate from following positional arguments (0.842791ms)
✔ strict parser rejects unknown, duplicate, missing-value, and boolean-value options (0.252208ms)
✔ help bypasses required task validation without accepting unrelated options (0.072416ms)
✔ catalog discovery receives only trusted overrides, never configured executables or args (0.096834ms)
✔ dry-run budget validation is strict and checks the planned minimum (0.106ms)
✔ verification commands require an explicit run opt-in (0.0895ms)
✔ run ids are strict and resolve only beneath the runs directory (5.670625ms)
✔ report and replay output contracts preserve the frozen run (0.40225ms)
✔ report output cannot alias the immutable report or manifest (2.117458ms)
✔ replay output rejects a physical path that enters the frozen run through a symlink (0.6965ms)
✔ dry-run validates verification opt-in and the planned call budget without executing (1.2835ms)
✔ an authorized run passes verification consent and the validated budget to the pipeline (0.25125ms)
✔ report defaults to a regenerated file and leaves the original immutable (1.615417ms)
✔ inspect prints the restored pipeline manifest runId and preserves warn exit status (0.936875ms)
✔ frozen replay verifies before atomically copying and never mutates run artifacts (2.401167ms)
✔ warn and fail statuses use the non-success exit code (0.065041ms)
✔ loadConfig returns a mutable copy of defaults when the file is absent (2.833375ms)
✔ loadConfig deep-merges validated JSON and expands environment variables (0.4965ms)
✔ expandEnvironment is recursive, supports fallback and escaped dollars (0.076ms)
✔ loadConfig accepts $schema and the checked-in example matches defaults (2.088291ms)
✔ schema exposes the same secure catalog and verification surfaces (0.657667ms)
✔ loadConfig reports invalid JSON and missing environment variables (0.3315ms)
✔ validator rejects missing or unsupported versions and unknown root keys (0.13525ms)
✔ project config cannot override the catalog executable or arguments (0.086541ms)
✔ validator enforces catalog role names and override structure (0.148833ms)
✔ validator enforces routing ranges and threshold ordering (0.127125ms)
✔ validator enforces stage effort keys and values (0.082834ms)
✔ verification commands require structured executable and argument arrays (0.1165ms)
✔ reader gate ranges, uniqueness, mode, and model-call budget are coherent (0.235042ms)
✔ limits are bounded integers and reject unknown knobs (0.130792ms)
✔ validateConfig returns a valid config without mutating it (0.067ms)
✔ codexArgs keeps the scout read-only and applies model effort (0.96525ms)
✔ codexArgs does not pass the auto sentinel as a model (0.075792ms)
✔ spawnCapture writes stdin without shell interpolation (31.235625ms)
✔ runVerification accepts argv objects and never interprets shell syntax (26.746583ms)
✔ spawnCapture caps stdout and stderr independently at 2 MiB (31.688375ms)
✔ spawnCapture kills the full POSIX process group after timeout (984.704167ms)
✔ mapPool preserves input order (3.923042ms)
✔ buildRunPlan counts deterministic and live reader calls (1.427ms)
✔ runPipeline completes with injected model execution and writes a frozen report (30.259416ms)
✔ mutation without verification commands is WARN, never a verified pass (10.001125ms)
✔ a run never removes a workspace lock that it did not acquire (0.682375ms)
✔ Reader-10 exposes exactly ten named deterministic personas (0.406834ms)
✔ extractReadableText removes active content and preserves readable structure (0.666125ms)
✔ evaluateReader10 passes a structured and actionable Korean report (1.786208ms)
✔ evaluateReader10 rejects empty content and unsafe active embeds (0.974875ms)
✔ missing image alternative text is a critical Reader-10 failure (0.217583ms)
✔ aggregateReader10 requires at least nine passes and no critical issues (0.393041ms)
✔ payload audit rejects an unrelated summary even when a report template would look complete (0.377958ms)
✔ payload audit passes aligned content but does not claim semantic proof (0.263083ms)
✔ escapeHtml and sanitizeUrl reject HTML and executable URLs (0.62425ms)
✔ generateReport creates a self-contained, accessible Korean HTML report (2.576583ms)
✔ generateReport labels live Reader-10 as ten model calls without claiming independence (0.598125ms)
✔ generateReport labels deterministic-structure as automatic rules, not model readers (0.165459ms)
✔ generateReport presents pending live readers without implying execution or failure (0.149375ms)
✔ generateReport escapes every caller-provided HTML value and drops unsafe links (0.215208ms)
✔ generated full report clears the deterministic Reader-10 gate (3.210041ms)
✔ report rendering tolerates circular structured output (0.137125ms)
✔ simple read-only work stays economy and disables mutation stages (0.998625ms)
✔ security, deployment, and deletion language deterministically escalates risk (0.881333ms)
✔ explicit dimensions override heuristics and are validated (0.889667ms)
✔ routeTask emits all six stage contracts and a 10-reader clarity jury (0.433834ms)
✔ report and jury options adjust reader contracts without changing assessment (0.138334ms)
✔ small YAML parser extracts quoted nested interface values (0.915042ms)
✔ small YAML parser rejects malformed syntax instead of silently accepting it (0.4475ms)
✔ validator returns itemized YAML errors for malformed skill and agent metadata (19.178459ms)
✔ valid skill pack passes manifest, skill, agent, and relative-link checks (2.837083ms)
✔ validator reports placeholders, personalized paths, broken links, and agent metadata separately (2.39525ms)
✔ manifest paths must start with ./ and cannot traverse outside the plugin (2.383416ms)
✔ CLI help is side-effect free and JSON failure returns a nonzero status with itemized errors (2.010417ms)
✔ repository Relay10 plugin and all bundled skills pass the static validator (4.839167ms)
✔ Relay10 spec skill carries a bounded confirmed-contract workflow (2.6875ms)
✔ Relay10 spec evaluation set separates trigger, near-miss, outcome, and adversarial cases (1.674791ms)
✔ parseCli separates positional arguments and flags (0.71925ms)
✔ writeJson creates parent directories (4.810375ms)
✔ concurrent writeJson calls leave one complete document and no temporary files (1.433958ms)
✔ writeJson removes its temporary file when rename fails (0.900375ms)
✔ readText propagates errors unless a missing-file fallback is explicit (0.678791ms)
✔ latestRun skips missing and malformed manifests (1.880042ms)
✔ hash is deterministic and run ids include milliseconds plus an injected UUID suffix (0.948791ms)
ℹ tests 84
ℹ suites 0
ℹ pass 84
ℹ fail 0
ℹ cancelled 0
ℹ skipped 0
ℹ todo 0
ℹ duration_ms 1130.459417

> node --check src/*.mjs && node --check test/*.mjs && node --check scripts/*.mjs

commands.label: 출시 작업 모델 배정 미리보기
args: research current coding harnesses, build a lightweight CLI, verify it, and prepare a release
commands.commandLine: node src/cli.mjs route research current coding harnesses, build a lightweight CLI, verify it, and prepare a release --json
commands.stdout:
{
  "task": "research current coding harnesses, build a lightweight CLI, verify it, and prepare a release",
  "assessment": {
    "task": "research current coding harnesses, build a lightweight CLI, verify it, and prepare a release",
    "complexity": 0,
    "risk": 3,
    "blastRadius": 2,
    "verifiability": 3,
    "reversibility": 1,
    "score": 17,
    "role": "frontier",
    "readOnly": false
  },
  "stages": [
    {
      "id": "scout",
      "purpose": "Gather evidence and read source material.",
      "modelRole": "economy",
      "effort": "low",
      "mode": "read",
      "enabled": true,
      "writes": false,
      "output": "evidence",
      "model": "gpt-5.6-luna",
      "modelSource": "catalog"
    },
    {
      "id": "architect",
      "purpose": "Analyze evidence and produce the implementation plan.",
      "modelRole": "frontier",
      "effort": "max",
      "mode": "plan",
      "enabled": true,
      "writes": false,
      "output": "plan",
      "model": "gpt-5.6-sol",
      "modelSource": "catalog"
    },
    {
      "id": "maker",
      "purpose": "Implement the approved plan in the isolated workspace.",
      "modelRole": "balanced",
      "effort": "medium",
      "mode": "write",
      "enabled": true,
      "writes": true,
      "output": "changes",
      "model": "gpt-5.6-terra",
      "modelSource": "catalog"
    },
    {
      "id": "reviewer",
      "purpose": "Verify correctness, safety, and acceptance criteria.",
      "modelRole": "frontier",
      "effort": "high",
      "mode": "verify",
      "enabled": true,
      "writes": false,
      "output": "review",
      "model": "gpt-5.6-sol",
      "modelSource": "catalog"
    },
    {
      "id": "explainer",
      "purpose": "Create the final human-facing HTML explanation.",
      "modelRole": "balanced",
      "effort": "low",
      "mode": "report",
      "enabled": true,
      "writes": true,
      "output": "html",
      "model": "gpt-5.6-terra",
      "modelSource": "catalog"
    },
    {
      "id": "reader",
      "purpose": "Judge whether the report is understandable without hidden context.",
      "modelRole": "economy",
      "effort": "low",
      "mode": "read",
      "enabled": true,
      "writes": false,
      "fanout": 10,
      "quorum": 9,
      "maxRounds": 2,
      "output": "clarity-verdicts",
      "model": "gpt-5.6-luna",
      "modelSource": "catalog"
    }
  ],
  "liveReaders": false,
  "invocationEstimate": {
    "minimum": 5,
    "maximum": 5,
    "unit": "codex-exec-invocations"
  },
  "callEstimate": {
    "minimum": 5,
    "maximum": 5,
    "unit": "codex-exec-invocations"
  }
}
